job_statement: When deploying Argo CD instances, I want to manage resource allocation for workloads, so I can ensure optimal performance and meet namespace resource quotas
context: Deploying and managing Argo CD instances in resource-constrained environments
success_criteria: Argo CD workloads meet namespace quotas
Resource requests and limits are properly configured
All components have appropriate resource allocations
evidence: With the Argo CD custom resource (CR), you can create, update, and delete resource requests and limits for Argo CD workloads

job_statement: When setting up a new Argo CD instance, I want to configure resource requests and limits for all workloads, so I can deploy in namespaces with resource quotas
context: Initial Argo CD instance deployment in quota-restricted namespace
success_criteria: All workload components have defined resource requirements
Instance deploys successfully in quota namespace
parent_job: When deploying Argo CD instances, I want to manage resource allocation for workloads, so I can ensure optimal performance and meet namespace resource quotas
section: Configuring workloads with resource requests and limits
evidence: You can create Argo CD custom resource workloads with resource requests and limits. This is required when you want to deploy the Argo CD instance in a namespace that is configured with resource quotas

job_statement: Create Argo CD CR with resource specifications for Application Controller
context: Defining resource requirements in Argo CD custom resource
parent_job: When setting up a new Argo CD instance, I want to configure resource requests and limits for all workloads, so I can deploy in namespaces with resource quotas
section: Configuring workloads with resource requests and limits
evidence:
controller:
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: '2'
      memory: 2Gi
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 1Gi

job_statement: Create Argo CD CR with resource specifications for ApplicationSet Controller
context: Defining resource requirements in Argo CD custom resource
parent_job: When setting up a new Argo CD instance, I want to configure resource requests and limits for all workloads, so I can deploy in namespaces with resource quotas
section: Configuring workloads with resource requests and limits
evidence:
applicationSet:
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: '2'
      memory: 1Gi
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 512Mi

job_statement: Create Argo CD CR with resource specifications for Server component
context: Defining resource requirements in Argo CD custom resource
parent_job: When setting up a new Argo CD instance, I want to configure resource requests and limits for all workloads, so I can deploy in namespaces with resource quotas
section: Configuring workloads with resource requests and limits
evidence:
server:
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 256Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 125m
      memory: 128Mi

job_statement: When Argo CD is already deployed, I want to update resource requirements for workloads, so I can optimize performance or adjust to changing capacity needs
success_criteria: New limits applied to running pods
parent_job: When deploying Argo CD instances, I want to manage resource allocation for workloads, so I can ensure optimal performance and meet namespace resource quotas
section: Patching Argo CD instance to update the resource requirements
evidence: You can update the resource requirements for all or any of the workloads post installation

job_statement: Update Application Controller CPU request using oc patch
parent_job: When Argo CD is already deployed, I want to update resource requirements for workloads, so I can optimize performance or adjust to changing capacity needs
section: Patching Argo CD instance to update the resource requirements

job_statement: Update Application Controller memory request using oc patch
parent_job: When Argo CD is already deployed, I want to update resource requirements for workloads, so I can optimize performance or adjust to changing capacity needs
section: Patching Argo CD instance to update the resource requirements

job_statement: When resource constraints are no longer applicable, I want to remove resource requirements from workloads, so I can allow unrestricted resource consumption
context: Removing quota restrictions or moving to unrestricted namespace
parent_job: When deploying Argo CD instances, I want to manage resource allocation for workloads, so I can ensure optimal performance and meet namespace resource quotas
evidence: You can also remove resource requirements for all or any of your workloads after installation
related_approaches: Use oc patch with remove operation

job_statement: Remove Application Controller CPU request using oc patch
parent_job: When resource constraints are no longer applicable, I want to remove resource requirements from workloads, so I can allow unrestricted resource consumption

job_statement: When managing GitOps console components, I want to configure resource allocation for plugin and backend services, so I can control memory usage and ensure stable performance
context: Managing OpenShift GitOps console plugin resource consumption
success_criteria: Plugin components have defined resource limits
Backend services operate within allocated resources
Memory and CPU usage is predictable
section: Configure resource requests and limits for GitOps plugin components
evidence: You can configure CPU and memory resource requests and limits for the {gitops-shortname} console plugin and its backend cluster components

job_statement: When configuring GitOps plugin resources, I want to set specific requests and limits via GitOpsService CR, so I can address memory and performance issues in console components
context: Configuring GitOps console plugin resource allocation
parent_job: When managing GitOps console components, I want to configure resource allocation for plugin and backend services, so I can control memory usage and ensure stable performance
evidence: To enable resource configuration for the {gitops-shortname} plugin components, specify the .spec.consolePlugin.backend.resources field for the backend component and the .spec.consolePlugin.gitopsPlugin.resources field
pain_points: Balancing backend vs plugin resource allocation

parent_job: When configuring GitOps plugin resources, I want to set specific requests and limits via GitOpsService CR, so I can address memory and performance issues in console components

job_statement: Edit GitOpsService CR to add backend and plugin resource specifications
parent_job: When configuring GitOps plugin resources, I want to set specific requests and limits via GitOpsService CR, so I can address memory and performance issues in console components

job_statement: Verify resource configuration applied to pods
parent_job: When configuring GitOps plugin resources, I want to set specific requests and limits via GitOpsService CR, so I can address memory and performance issues in console components

job_statement: When planning resource allocation, I want to understand how GitOpsService controller applies resource values, so I can make informed decisions about custom vs default configurations
parent_job: When managing GitOps console components, I want to configure resource allocation for plugin and backend services, so I can control memory usage and ensure stable performance
evidence: The following information describes how the GitOpsService controller applies resource values defined in the GitOpsService custom resource (CR)

job_statement: Review default resource values for backend and plugin components
parent_job: When planning resource allocation, I want to understand how GitOpsService controller applies resource values, so I can make informed decisions about custom vs default configurations
evidence: Backend: Request CPU 250m, Request Memory 128Mi, Limit CPU 500m, Limit Memory 256Mi; GitOps plugin: Request CPU 250m, Request Memory 128Mi, Limit CPU 500m, Limit Memory 256Mi
